Whether you need representation at Maidstone, the county's main custody facility, or at stations in Canterbury, Medway, Folkestone or Tunbridge Wells, our directory connects you with experienced, accredited professionals.All representatives listed in our Kent directory state they hold current Police Station Representatives Accreditation Scheme (PSRAS) accreditation through the Law Society. Main custody facilities include Maidstone (the largest), Medway Police Station in Gillingham, Canterbury, Folkestone, and Tunbridge Wells. Not all police stations have custody facilities - many have been consolidated into larger custody centres.How do I find a police station representative in Kent?Use our directory to search for accredited representatives covering Kent police stations. You can filter by availability, view which stations they cover, and contact them directly via phone, email or WhatsApp. All listed representatives hold current PSRAS accreditation.What areas do Kent police station reps cover?Representatives in our Kent directory typically cover the whole county including Maidstone, Canterbury, Medway (Gillingham, Chatham, Rochester), Tunbridge Wells, Folkestone, Dover, Ashford, Dartford, Gravesend, Sevenoaks, Tonbridge and surrounding areas. Many also cover neighbouring counties.Are Kent police station representatives available 24/7?Many representatives offer 24/7 availability, while others work specific hours. Our directory shows each representative's availability status so you can find someone who matches your needs, whether it's daytime, evenings, weekends or out-of-hours cover.How much do Kent police station reps charge?Police station representation is typically funded through Legal Aid when the client qualifies. Representatives are paid fixed fees under the Legal Aid Agency fee scheme. For private work, fees vary - contact representatives directly to discuss their rates.Are You a Police Station Representative in Kent?Join our directory for free and get discovered by criminal defence firms across the county.Register for Free Become Featured
